svg.aria-label: The complete closed-loop platform running its mission. Top: the full loop - a motion-profile setpoint into a summing junction, error to the PID (Kp 0.15, Ki 0.4, Kd 0.01), to valve and platform, position sensor feeding back, with a feedforward path. Middle: the trajectory rises to 500 mm and holds inside a narrow plus-or-minus 1 mm band; at 8 seconds a load disturbance dips it below target and the controller returns it within a second. A verdict panel: reaches height, holds plus or minus 1 mm at 0.01 mm actual, rejects disturbance, stable at 2.7 times margin.
svg.text: Everything together: reaches the commanded height and holds ±1 mm, rejecting disturbance.
MISSION: rise to 500 mm, hold ±1 mm, reject a load at 8 s
time — rises, holds dead on target, dips at load, recovers
